name: Hashigami
description: Hashigami is a young boy who goes to the same school as Yuzu Kurosaki and Karin Kurosaki. He has light and messy brown hair and freckles on his cheeks. He doesn't like Karin much because of her bad reputation. He likes to play video games with his friends Kaneda and Ino, rather than participating in gym class.  (Source: Bleach Wiki)
